objections.objection_text: Why be a good man if God 'tricked' me and I didn't get the relationship I wanted?
objections.underlying_belief: Goodness is a currency to be traded for desired outcomes rather than an intrinsic alignment with God.
objections.underlying_fear: Being a fool for doing things 'the right way' and still losing.
objections.counter_truth_angle: Being 'good' for a reward isn't goodness; it's a contract. True goodness follows Christ into the betrayal and the cross.
objections.transcript_proof_quote_redacted: I know how, you know, the Lord betrayed me. He tricked me... If you surrender, if you do all this, you're going to be good enough for her. And that's not what happened.
